name: Document
description: The base Hypermedia document — resolved metadata (including the schema-binding fields `schema`, `childrenSchema`, `schemaDefinition`) plus the content block tree. Every typed document schema EXTENDS this via `ref: hm://seed.hyper.media/document`, refining `metadata` (e.g. requiring an extra field) and/or `content`. A document's effective conformance schema is its metadata's `schema`, or — for a child — its parent's `childrenSchema`.
